messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0075",
  "title": "画面与音效表现",
  "page_index": 30,
  "page_range": "30"
}

Section text:
画面与音效表现

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance) on page 30. It contains no substantive content, data, or references. Therefore, it can only answer high-level structural or navigational questions, such as identifying the section title or confirming the document includes a topic dedicated to visual and audio performance. It does not provide information to answer questions regarding specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
